title: Straw Hats Hold the Line
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #8, Straw Hat Pirates, Unknown person #9, Yamato, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11 as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 1st Floor - passage leading up to the ATTIC

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It is high time wano submitted!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You are fighting a losing battle!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The Victor has already been decided!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: this is one of those "marys," right?! If it's here, that means...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This is bad!! MOMONOSURE- SAMA!! MOMO- NOSURE-SAMA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We need to deal with this frog!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Shinobu, it's good to see you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Stand back, Shinobu!! He's a fraud!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: After what you did to Ashura- San...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even the sharpest sword becomes dull when pointed at a friend...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop calling me that while wearing his face, Kanjuro!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I took you and Izo in, remember?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How could you raise a sword against me?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I couldn't bring myself to cut him...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Turnabout is fair play! You gave me a fatal wound earlier, after all!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 46 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
